profile.name: Jana Mufti
profile.title: AI & Cybersecurity Student
profile.bio: Designing intelligent systems. Securing what matters.
profile.about:
I am a Computer Science student at Effat University, where I bridge the gap between building intelligent agents and securing the infrastructure they run on.

My academic journey focuses on Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity. I am deeply curious about how systems "think" through algorithms and how they can be broken—and subsequently protected—from malicious actors.

Beyond the terminal, I view the world through a creative lens. My interest in photography teaches me to look for details others miss, while my love for video games fuels my appreciation for complex, interactive systems.

projects.title: Sentinel AI
projects.description: An anomaly detection system for network traffic that uses unsupervised learning to identify potential zero-day intrusions.
projects.details: Sentinel AI analyzes packet capture data in real-time. Unlike signature-based IDS, it establishes a baseline of normal network behavior and flags statistical deviations. Achieved 94% accuracy on the NSL-KDD dataset.

projects.title: NeuroArt Engine
projects.description: A generative art tool that applies the stylistic elements of classic paintings to modern digital photography.
projects.details: Implemented a VGG-19 based style transfer algorithm. Optimized inference time by 40% using model quantization. Built a simple frontend to allow users to upload content and style images.
